must_have_skills: Salesforce Development (Force.com, VisualForce, APEX, Lightning Web Components)
System Integrations (Salesforce ecosystem, backend services, AWS)
Programming (Python, Ruby, Golang, Java, C++, C#, Rust)
3+ years of non-internship professional software development experience
2+ years of non-internship design or architecture (design patterns, reliability and scaling) of new and existing systems experience
Experience programming with at least one software programming language
Passion to provide great customer experience
nice_to_have_skills: 3+ years of full software development life cycle, including coding standards, code reviews, source control management, build processes, testing, and operations experience
Bachelor's degree in computer science or equivalent
Experience with building web-based applications and/or web services-based applications
Re-use and efficient coding best practices
